hero.title: Your AI Visual Style Library
hero.subtitle: StylePrompts offers 100+ carefully crafted visual style prompts. From tech minimal to retro cyberpunk, apply with one click to generate brand-aligned UI design instructions.

features.title: Why StylePrompts?
features.subtitle: A visual style library built for designers and developers

f1.title: 100+ Curated Styles
f1.desc: From tech minimal and cyberpunk to Japanese zen, covering all visual aesthetics for any project.

f2.title: Live UI Preview
f2.desc: Every style comes with a complete UI preview, so you see the result before applying.

f3.title: One-Click Copy
f3.desc: Select style, industry, and use case. Get optimized AI prompts ready to paste into your AI tools.

workflow.title: Get Started in 3 Steps
workflow.subtitle: From choosing a style to getting your prompt, it only takes seconds.

b1.title: Choose a Visual Style
b1.desc: Browse 100+ styles and find the perfect visual language for your brand.

b2.title: Select Industry & Use Case
b2.desc: Auto-optimize prompts based on your industry (SaaS, e-commerce, healthcare) and page type.

b3.title: Copy & Use
b3.desc: One-click copy the generated prompt, paste into ChatGPT, Claude, or Cursor to start creating.

b4.title: Preview & Adjust
b4.desc: Check the live UI preview to ensure the style matches expectations before development.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.a1: StylePrompts is a visual style prompt library offering 100 curated styles to help you quickly get high-quality AI UI design instructions.
faq.q2: How do I use the generated prompts?
faq.a2: Select a style, copy the prompt, and paste it into ChatGPT, Claude, Cursor, or any AI tool to start generating UI.
faq.q3: What extra features does Pro offer?
faq.a3: Pro provides 100 advanced visual styles, exclusive style updates, and priority support with new features.

footer.description: Your AI visual style library. 100+ curated styles, one-click prompt generation, accelerating your UI development.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: We value your privacy. StylePrompts is a purely frontend visual style library.

collection.title: Data Collection
collection.desc: StylePrompts does not collect any personal data. All operations are performed locally in your browser. We do not track your usage behavior or store your generated prompts.

ownership.title: Prompt Ownership
ownership.desc: All prompts you generate and copy from this site are entirely yours. You can use them freely in any AI tool without attribution.

security.title: Data Security
security.desc: Since we do not transmit or store any user data to servers, there is no risk of data breach. Your browser preferences are stored only in LocalStorage.

cookies.title: Cookie Usage
cookies.desc: This site only uses essential technical cookies for basic functionality (such as language preferences). We do not use any tracking or advertising cookies.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.subtitle: Welcome to StylePrompts visual style library. By using this site, you agree to the following terms.

acceptance.title: Service Nature
acceptance.desc: StylePrompts is a free visual style prompt library, providing pre-designed UI style prompts for you to copy and use. This site does not provide AI generation services, only prompt content.

account.title: License Scope
account.desc: The visual style prompts provided on this site are freely licensed. You may use the generated prompts for personal or commercial projects without payment or attribution. However, style preview images are for reference only and not licensed for redistribution.

usage.title: Fair Use
usage.desc: You agree not to: (1) scrape or auto-download site content in bulk; (2) repackage site content as a competing service; (3) remove or alter copyright notices on this site.

changes.title: Content Updates
changes.desc: We continuously update the visual style library, add new styles, and optimize prompt content. Some base styles are permanently free, while advanced styles may require upgrading to Pro.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.desc: Prompts on this site are suggestions only. The final results of AI generation depend on your AI tool and model. We make no guarantees regarding the quality or suitability of AI-generated content.

coffee.title: Buy Me a Coffee
coffee.subtitle: If StylePrompts has been helpful to you, consider buying me a coffee to support the continued development of this project!
coffee.ctaDesc: Your support is the biggest motivation for me to continue developing and maintaining this project. Every coffee represents your recognition and encouragement!

reason1.title: Indie Developer
reason1.desc: This is a project built by an indie developer. Your support helps me focus on creating better tools.

reason2.title: Continuous Updates
reason2.desc: Your sponsorship helps me keep updating the visual style library with more curated design styles.

reason3.title: Keep It Free
reason3.desc: Your support helps keep the core features free, so more people can benefit from this tool.

coffee.thanks: Thank you to every supporter. Your encouragement keeps this project growing 💜
